topbar.monitor_tip: Live preview & remote control — operate target window remotely
topbar.log_tip: View current session & history log files
topbar.settings_tip: Configure capture, model, theme & input mapping
topbar.devtools_tip: Developer tools — Test Target, Self-Test, Frame Dump, UI Demos

connection.title: Connection
connection.select_tip: Choose a window or desktop to capture
connection.disconnect_tip: Disconnect from current window, back to desktop
connection.window_title_tip: Currently selected target window (read-only, use Select to change)
connection.minimized_warning: Window is minimized. {method} cannot capture. Switch to WGC or restore the window.

screenshot.title: Screenshot
screenshot.empty_hint: Click 📷 Snapshot or ▶ Preview to begin

targetPicker.mode_description: Select the current state of the target window. The system will recommend the optimal capture method:

settings.snapshot_auto_tip: Auto-select capture method based on window state: foreground/background → WGC, desktop/minimized → DXGI
settings.stream_auto_tip: Auto-select stream method (currently only WGC supports real-time streaming)
settings.dxgi_stream_tip: DXGI streaming not implemented, only WGC supports live preview
settings.mouse_hint: Virtual cursor always visible — local mouse unaffected
settings.keyboard_hint: Click the preview to focus, then keystrokes are forwarded to the target window
settings.keyboard_note2: • Combos — auto-detected (e.g. Ctrl+C, Ctrl pressed first then C)
settings.keyboard_note3: • {esc} or external click → releases focus, auto-releases all held keys
settings.self_target_hint: During desktop capture, mapped coordinates may land on GAM's own window
settings.self_target_warn_desc: Cursor turns red & warns when hovering over GAM window — simple & safe
settings.self_target_exclude_desc: Hide GAM window from desktop capture — requires Windows 10 2004+
settings.model_desc: Base model + fine-tuning adapter for game-specific AI.
settings.permission_normal_tip: Normal user privileges (default) — sufficient for regular apps, no UAC prompt
settings.permission_admin_tip: Administrator privileges — can control apps running as admin; click to trigger UAC & restart
settings.theme_light_tip: Light theme — white background with dark text
settings.keep_files_tip: Number of historical log files shown in Log panel
settings.dev_mode_tip: Developer mode — force red/hacker-green theme, unlock frame dump features
settings.mapping_key_tip: Current hotkey — click Change to modify
settings.change_mapping_tip: Click then press a new key combo; release all keys to confirm
settings.modifier_only_tip: Hotkey contains only modifier keys (Ctrl/Alt/Shift/Win). May conflict with system shortcuts. Add at least one non-modifier key (letter, digit, or F1-F12).
settings.hotkey_indicator_tip: Hotkey trigger indicator — flashes green when combo is pressed
settings.check_update_latest_tip: New version available, click to install
settings.gitee_tip: Open project Gitee page in browser
settings.star_tip: Star the project to support development
settings.tech_stack: C++ WebView2 · React · Tailwind · DXGI · WGC

monitor.no_preview_hint: Click Preview button to start real-time preview
monitor.remote_active: Remote control · Mouse {mm} · Keyboard {km} · Esc to release
monitor.remote_hover: Hover to move cursor · Click to control · Mouse {mm}
monitor.self_target_warn: ⚠ Mapped target is GAM's own window — switch to "Exclude from Capture" in Settings
monitor.preview_no_mapping: Previewing · Press {hotkey} or click "Mapping" to enable control

update.error_fallback: Unable to connect to update server. Please try again later.
update.needs_full_installer: A full installer is required (update mechanism incompatible). Please download the latest setup from Gitee.
update.full_package_hint: This is a full update (download all files)
update.resume_detail: {done}/{total} files completed ({doneSize} / {totalSize}) — "Continue" will skip completed files and download the rest.
update.re_download_tip: Discard downloaded files, download all from scratch
update.force_update_tip: Force download all files (use when local files are corrupted or incremental update misses files)
update.continue_download_tip: Skip completed files, download remaining only

wgc.name: WGC
wgc.desc: GPU-accelerated, supports background/occluded windows. Preferred for foreground, background & desktop.

dxgi.name: DXGI
dxgi.desc: Full-desktop GDI bitmap. The only viable option for minimized windows.

render_shared.name: SharedBuffer
render_shared.desc: C++ COM SharedBuffer → JS ArrayBuffer → Canvas putImageData. Zero-copy, no codec.

render_h264.name: H.264
render_h264.desc: GPU MFT hardware encode → fMP4 segments → MSE → <video> tag. Low latency, high compression.

render_h265.name: H.265
render_h265.desc: HEVC hardware encode. Higher compression but limited compatibility (needs Windows 11 + HEVC extension).

foreground.label: Foreground
foreground.desc: Window visible and on top → WGC GPU-accelerated recommended

background.label: Background
background.desc: Window occluded but not minimized → WGC (only method supporting background capture)

background.name: Background
background.desc: Fully background, never grabs mouse. Virtual cursor + PostMessage click forwarding. Window may drift but local use unaffected. Recommended to minimize target window.

semi.name: Semi
semi.desc: Semi-background, briefly grabs mouse on click. Virtual cursor always visible; move doesn't grab, click repositions via SendInput & clicks.

seize.name: Seize
seize.desc: Foreground mode, fully grabs mouse. Virtual cursor + real-time cursor sync. SendInput synthesizes system input on same path as real hardware.

postmsg.name: PostMsg
postmsg.desc: Async non-blocking, fast & stable. Posts WM_KEYDOWN/WM_KEYUP messages directly to target window queue.

sendmsg.name: SendMsg
sendmsg.desc: AttachThreadInput + SendMessage synchronous dispatch. Correctly updates target thread input state. Good compatibility.

seize.name: Seize
seize.desc: SendInput API synthesizes system keyboard input. Requires target window in foreground. Subject to UIPI restrictions.

devtools.test_target_desc: Launch a standalone test window to verify input mapping
devtools.test_target_launch_tip: Open GAM Test Target window — can be captured by GAM for mouse/keyboard mapping tests
devtools.test_target_close_tip: Close GAM Test Target test window
devtools.selftest_desc: Run automated full workflow (select → preview → mapping → dense clicks), compare test_target feedback
devtools.selftest_density_tip: Per-cell sampling density (N×N sub-grid). Higher = finer, takes longer.
devtools.selftest_run_tip: One-click self-test: reuses real user operation path, dense full-window clicks with feedback comparison
devtools.frame_dump_capture_desc: Save each 📷 snapshot as PNG to disk
devtools.frame_dump_capture_tip: When enabled, each snapshot is auto-saved as PNG to Dump dir
devtools.frame_dump_stream_desc: Save each ▶ preview frame as PNG to disk
devtools.frame_dump_stream_tip: When enabled, each preview frame is auto-saved as PNG to Dump dir (watch disk space)
devtools.misc_skeleton_desc: Show startup skeleton screen, auto-dismiss after 3 seconds
devtools.misc_skeleton_tip: Preview the app startup skeleton screen effect, auto-closes after 3s
devtools.ui_demos_desc: Pure frontend mock data, no backend calls. Preview UI states that are hard to trigger manually.

selftest.title: Self-Test · Mapping Calibration
selftest.diag_missed: • Some clicks received no feedback → input forwarding may be interrupted (check mouse mode / target window)
selftest.diag_large_error: • Average pixel error is large → possible coordinate offset / scaling / DPI mismatch
selftest.diag_systematic: • Systematic offset ({dx}, {dy})px detected → constant offset, consider calibrating origin
selftest.diag_perfect: • Mapping accurate — all hits in expected cells, pixel error within rounding tolerance ✓

app.resize_expand: Drag right to expand the panel
app.resize_drag: Drag to resize; drag all the way right to collapse
